title: saxifraga lychnitis var. lychnitis
intro: Saxifraga lychnitis var. lychnitis, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its rosettes of leaves and yellow-green flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stop bleeding and reduce inflammation due to its tannins and flavonoids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as aiding in menopausal symptoms, promoting uterine health, and supporting digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Lady's Mantle can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used for its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects.
